ddls:
CREATE TABLE "network_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network device */,
  "ipaddr" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device (e.g., router, switch, firewall) */,
  "hardware_model" TEXT /* Model of the network device */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software running on the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the device */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the device (e.g., active, maintenance, offline) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last time the device was updated or checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network traffic event */,
  "oml_sender_id" INTEGER /* Oml sender ID */,
  "oml_seq" INTEGER /* Oml sequence number */,
  "oml_ts_client" REAL /* Timestamp of the packet on the client-side */,
  "oml_ts_server" REAL /* Timestamp of the packet on the server-side */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that sent/received the packet */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the source device */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the destination device */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Network protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet in bytes */,
  "packet_type" TEXT /* Type of packet (e.g., data, control) */,
  "security_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the packet is marked as a security threat */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_traffic_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device that the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., latency, packet loss) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., ms for latency, % for packet loss) */,
  "measurement_interval" INTEGER /* Interval at which the metric is measured (e.g., every 5 minutes) */,
  "alert_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value to trigger alerts */,
  "alert_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if an alert has been triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES network_devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource the user has access to (e.g., network_devices, network_traffic, performance_metrics) */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security alert */,
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network traffic event related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of security alert (e.g., suspicious activity, known threat) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Time when the alert was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_alerts_traffic_id FOREIGN KEY ("traffic_id") REFERENCES network_traffic ("traffic_id")
)
